description_long: This is a mid-century modern style filing cabinet constructed primarily from wood, featuring a warm brown finish with a subtle wood grain texture. The front face displays three drawers, each with a distinct handle: the top drawer has two small round knobs, while the lower two drawers have horizontal recessed handles. The cabinet stands on four angled, tapered legs, giving it a slightly elevated and stable stance. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or hardware visible. The overall design is minimalist, functional, and suitable for storing documents or office supplies in an urban environment.
description: A wooden filing cabinet with three drawers, distinct handles, and angled legs, finished in a warm brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers, two round knobs on the top drawer, and horizontal recessed handles on the lower drawers.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wooden surface.
